summary: Comprehensive frontend QA testing completed for Safe-Spend escrow dashboard. Tested landing page, auth flows, dashboard pages, docs, admin login, responsive design, and navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Tour modal appears on every page load and blocks navigation. Modal keeps reappearing even after closing, making it difficult to navigate between dashboard pages.
404 page shows blank screen instead of proper 404 error message when navigating to non-existent routes like /nonexistent-page

details: Hero section loads with correct messaging: 'Your agent needs a trust account, not a wallet'
Primary and secondary CTA buttons present
Code snippet tabs (Python, TypeScript, cURL) working
Main nav links visible (Features, How It Works, Pricing, Docs)
Log in and Dashboard buttons present
Footer with Terms and Privacy links present
Name, email, password, confirm password inputs present with data-testid
Form validation works - shows 'Please fill in all fields' for empty form
Password mismatch validation works - shows 'Passwords do not match'
Successful signup creates user and returns token
Email and password inputs present with data-testid
Dashboard loads with stat cards (Total Escrowed, Total Spent, Active Rules, Pending Approvals)
Sidebar navigation visible with all links
New Escrow Account button present with data-testid='new-account-btn'
Balance stats displayed (Total Balance, Total Funded, Total Spent, Active Accounts)
Policy Wizard button present with data-testid='wizard-btn'
Links to Trust Law Explainer present
Request Builder with quick scenarios (Happy Path, Vendor Not Allowed, Over Daily Cap, Requires Human Approval)
Form fields for Escrow Account, API Key, Amount, Vendor, Category, Description
Response, Rules, Code Snippets tabs present
Admin email and password inputs present
375px (Mobile) - Landing page renders correctly with hamburger menu
1280px (Desktop) - Landing page renders correctly with full nav

action_items: Consider adding a 'Don't show again' option or localStorage persistence for the guided tour modal to prevent it from appearing on every page load
Add proper 404 page component that displays when navigating to non-existent routes
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Landing page correctly uses escrow/fiduciary/trust terminology instead of wallet
Form validation is working correctly on signup and login pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend QA testing completed. All major pages load correctly. The guided tour modal appears on dashboard pages and may need to be dismissed. Test user created: frontendtest@example.com / TestPassword123!. All data-testid attributes are properly set for automated testing.
